ValidationRule.description: If the value of field 'Status' is Completed, the field 'Request_handled' shouldnt be null.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Data_Performance_Management_Request', ISPICKVAL (Status,'Completed'), ISPICKVAL( Request_Handled__c, '') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Ensure that the field Request Handled is filled if the request is completed .
